title: Passionate Freelance Developer of Apps

posts.author: ropax (Pablo )
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,
if you have a real passion to the new features of Monday.com , you are the one
We have a very active Monday with a lot of integrations.
we would like to explore what we can improve with an app. from views to automatizations.
you should have some experience building monday apps.
Best,
Pablo

posts.author: Renae-JTsCloud (Renae-upstream)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Pablo,

My team and I have partnered with monday.com since 2017.

We specialise in helping teams maximise the power of their monday account, as well as building custom integrations and app to make them even more powerful.

If you want to send me an email at renae@jtscloud.com we can talk further and identify how we can help you best.

Looking forward to hearing from you.
